name: metalife-monthly-sheet
description: Import MetaLife timecard CSV exports into existing monthly Google Sheets reports while preserving formulas and formatting.

interface.longDescription: Parse MetaLife timecard CSV exports and guide safe updates to existing monthly Google Sheets reports while preserving headers, formulas, formatting, validations, dimensions, and summary cells.
defaultPrompt: Import a MetaLife timecard CSV into my monthly Google Sheet.
Parse this MetaLife CSV and summarize the monthly rows.
Check whether this MetaLife CSV can safely update my sheet.
